A user provider for the router type reports its own unresolved dependencies.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router => ROUTERDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"
)

type Missing struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewRouter(m *Missing) *router.Router { return router.New() }

type Docs struct {
	Router *router.Router
}

//fabrik:http GET /routes
func (d *Docs) List(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:12:16: no provider for *web.Missing
  help: add a //fabrik:provider returning *web.Missing
